# Casa Escondida Anilao Resort & Dive Center — Full Content Reference

> Boutique PADI 5-Star dive resort in Anilao, Mabini, Batangas, Philippines. 31 ocean-side rooms, professional dive center, restaurant, swimming pool, and private beach access. Free breakfast for all guests.

## About the Resort

Casa Escondida Anilao is a boutique ocean-front dive resort located in Brgy. Ligaya, Mabini, Batangas 4202, Philippines. It sits directly on Batangas Bay, one of the most biodiverse marine environments in the world and part of the Coral Triangle — the global centre of marine biodiversity.

The resort is approximately 140 km south of Manila and takes 2–3 hours to reach by private car or van via SLEX (South Luzon Expressway). The resort operates a full PADI 5-Star Dive Center and offers accommodation for divers and non-divers alike. TripAdvisor rating: 4.5 stars from 81 reviews (Travelers' Choice Award recipient).

**Website:** https://www.casaescondida-anilao.com/
**Address:** Brgy. Ligaya, Mabini, Batangas 4202, Philippines
**Phone:** +63 977 837 2272
**Email:** Available via contact form on website
**Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/CasaEscondidaAnilao/
**Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/casaescondidaanilao/
**Coordinates:** 13.7277078°N, 120.884266°E

## Accommodation

The resort has 31 ocean-side rooms across three categories. All rooms include free breakfast.

**Standard Double Room**
- Size: 18 sqm
- Beds: 2 single beds
- Capacity: up to 2 guests
- Features: air conditioning, wardrobe, private bathroom with shower

**Deluxe Double or Twin Room**
- Size: 40 sqm
- Beds: 2 double beds
- Capacity: up to 4 guests
- Features: sea view, balcony or terrace, air conditioning, wardrobe, private bathroom with shower

**Suite with Sea View** (Featured/Most Popular)
- Size: 50 sqm
- Beds: 2 double beds
- Capacity: up to 4 guests
- Features: private hot tub, separate living room, floor-to-ceiling glass doors, balcony with sea and pool view, marble bathroom with rain shower and bath, flat-screen TV, air conditioning

All rooms include: free breakfast, 24/7 front desk, free WiFi, daily housekeeping.

## Dive Center

Casa Escondida operates a PADI 5-Star Certified Dive Center with experienced divemasters and PADI-certified instructors.

**Facilities:**
- Private jetty for direct water entry
- Hot showers post-dive
- Full equipment rental (BCDs, regulators, wetsuits, fins, masks, computers)
- Camera rinse station with dedicated fresh-water tanks
- Nitrox fills up to 40% EANx on-site
- Equipment storage and drying area

**Fun Dives:**
- Guided dives to 30+ named dive sites around Anilao and Mabini
- Day dives and night dives available
- House reef accessible directly from jetty
- Dedicated divemaster per group

**PADI Courses Available:**
- Open Water Diver
- Advanced Open Water Diver
- Rescue Diver
- Divemaster
- Nitrox / Enriched Air Specialty
- Underwater Photography Specialty
- Night Diving Specialty
- Other specialty courses on request

**Dive Conditions:**
- Water temperature: 26–30°C year-round
- Visibility: 10–25m depending on season
- Best season: November–May (dry season, calmest conditions)
- Marine life: nudibranchs (250+ species), frogfish, pygmy seahorses, sea turtles, whale sharks (seasonal), mantis shrimp, cuttlefish, octopus, macro critters

## Resort Facilities

- Swimming pool with sea views
- Restaurant and bar serving Filipino and international cuisine
- Beachfront deck with direct sea access to Batangas Bay
- Conference/function hall for events and group bookings
- Free WiFi throughout the resort
- Free parking
- 24/7 front desk

**Dining:**
The resort restaurant serves fresh Filipino and international cuisine, cold drinks, cocktails, and the legendary island BBQ experience — a boat trip to a nearby sandbar for a beachside barbecue dinner at sunset.

## Location & Getting There

**Address:** Brgy. Ligaya, Mabini, Batangas 4202, Philippines
**Distance from Manila:** ~140 km, 2–3 hours via SLEX

**By Private Car or Van:**
SLEX → Star Tollway → Lipa City exit → Bauan → Mabini → Brgy. Ligaya → Casa Escondida

**By Bus + Tricycle:**
Take a Batangas-bound bus from Cubao or Buendia (PITX) to Batangas City Grand Terminal. Transfer to a jeepney or van going to Mabini, then tricycle to the resort.

**Private Van Transfer:**
The resort can arrange private air-conditioned van transfers from NAIA, Makati, BGC, or anywhere in Metro Manila. Contact the resort at least 48 hours in advance.

**Nearby:**
- Anilao Pier: 10 minutes
- Batangas City: 45 minutes
- Manila (EDSA area): 2.5–3.5 hours depending on traffic

## Nearby Dive Sites

Anilao has over 30 named dive sites accessible within 5–30 minutes by boat from Casa Escondida's private jetty.

**Top Dive Sites:**
- **Sombrero Island** – Shallow to mid-water reef, excellent for beginners. Famous for schooling fish and colorful corals.
- **Arthur's Rock** – Scenic pinnacle with abundant macro life. Ideal for underwater photography.
- **Kirby's Rock** – Wall and slope dive known for nudibranchs and frogfish. Expert to intermediate level.
- **Beatrice Rock** – Muck diving site with rare critters — frogfish, mantis shrimp, pygmy seahorses.
- **Sepok Wall** – Dramatic wall dive with large gorgonian sea fans and visibility up to 25m.
- **Twin Rocks** – Two connected rock formations with resident sea turtles and schooling reef fish.
- **Cathedral** – Cavern-like formation popular for wide-angle photography.
- **Mainit** – Hydrothermal vent site with unique thermophilic marine life.
- **Caban Island** – Pristine reef with excellent hard coral coverage and diverse fish life.

## Policies

- Check-in: 2:00 PM | Check-out: 12:00 PM (noon)
- Breakfast included for all registered guests
- Non-smoking rooms available
- Pets: not permitted
- Children: welcome
- Extra beds available on request
- Dive packages can be combined with room bookings
- Group bookings and event hosting available

## Reviews Summary

- TripAdvisor: 4.5 stars, 81 reviews (Travelers' Choice Award)
- Top guest feedback: professional dive team, beautiful sea views, excellent food, friendly staff, great value for divers
- Most popular room: Suite with Sea View
- Most popular experience: guided macro dives + island BBQ
